headline: Goldman Sachs Keeps Buy Rating on Masco (MAS) Stock
summary: Masco Corporation (NYSE:MAS) is one of the Best Wide Moat Stocks to Buy According to Wall Street Analysts. On May 14, analyst Susan Maklari of Goldman Sachs maintained a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock, while retaining the price objective of $90.00. The analyst’s rating is backed by the factors that support Masco Corporation (NYSE:MAS)’s capability to ramp up […]
